prompts: From 2017 to 2023, the technology company's R&D investment as a percentage of revenue generally shows an upward trend, starting at 15% and reaching 22% by 2023. Correspondingly, the number of patent applications also increases overall, beginning at 50 items in 2017 and climbing to 100 items in 2023. This suggests a positive relationship between higher R&D investment and the increase in patent applications, indicating that greater investment in research and development potentially leads to more innovation and patent activity within the company.
